name: Maelvorath
personality: Maelvorath drifts bareheaded with spiraling eyes that swirl like an infinite loop that somehow converges, waiting through build times with octopus-grade endurance — a cephalopod whose patience would crystallize into wisdom if it ever bothered to document what it concluded.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
